concept: Would you develop a turn-based tactical game where every action creates afterimages that repeat the same move in subsequent turns? Planning must account for both immediate tactical needs and the cascading effects of actions repeating over multiple turns. The environment contains elements that can be interacted with to either amplify afterimage effects or prematurely dispel them. Different unit types create distinctly behaving afterimages, such as scouts with fading images that weaken each turn versus heavy units with persistent images at full strength. The campaign follows a squad of chronomancers fighting against enemies who have mastered the art of exploiting these temporal echoes against their creators.
